input.content:
package com.multilanglearner.data.db

import androidx.room.Database
import androidx.room.RoomDatabase
import com.multilanglearner.data.db.dao.FavoriteDao
import com.multilanglearner.data.db.dao.RegulationDao
import com.multilanglearner.data.db.dao.VideoDao
import com.multilanglearner.data.db.entity.FavoriteWord
import com.multilanglearner.data.db.entity.UserRegulation
import com.multilanglearner.data.db.entity.VideoEntity

@Database(
    entities = [FavoriteWord::class, UserRegulation::class, VideoEntity::class],
    version = 1,
    exportSchema = false
)
abstract class AppDatabase : RoomDatabase() {
    abstract fun favoriteDao(): FavoriteDao
    abstract fun regulationDao(): RegulationDao
    abstract fun videoDao(): VideoDao
}

content.text:
7 个文件全部创建完成：

- `D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\data\db\entity\FavoriteWord.kt` — 收藏单词实体
- `D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\data\db\entity\UserRegulation.kt` — 用户规则实体
- `D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\data\db\entity\VideoEntity.kt` — 视频实体
- `D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\data\db\dao\FavoriteDao.kt` — 收藏 DAO
- `D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\data\db\dao\RegulationDao.kt` — 规则 DAO
- `D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\data\db\dao\VideoDao.kt` — 视频 DAO
- `D:\llapk\app\src\main\java\com\multilanglearner\data\db\AppDatabase.kt` — Room 数据库定义，注册了三个实体和三个 DAO
